title: cephalocarpus angustus
intro: Cephalocarpus angustus, also known as Indian or Chinese spurge, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and saponin content. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus angustus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically.
